productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men's Casual White Sneakers Shoe
description: Composition:The shoe has a rubber sole and synthetic upper PU.Shoe care:Use a soft clean cloth to wipe away dust. Do not machine wash.Fitting:Regular.These unique numero uno sneakers in white with black and white striped cushioning, minimalist red highlights and stitch detailing creates an impact on its own. A perfect addition to your wardrobe, these sneakers elevate any casual outfit and give it a real trendy feel. Wear them confidently with your jeans the next time you go out with your friends and enjoy the attention.
